# Tennis Cache Directory

**Created:** 2026-02-04
**Purpose:** Isolated cache for Tennis module data

## Contents
- Player match data
- Surface-specific stats
- Historical head-to-head records
- Tournament-level caching

## Rules
- Data expires after 24 hours during active tournaments
- Surface-split caches: HARD, CLAY, GRASS subdirectories allowed
- No cross-contamination with other sports
